content:
type: REVISE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Both our features require editing Encoding.encode() in core.py - can't be fully disjoint. Proposal: I'll add 'transformers' as a new keyword-only param inserted right after 'text' in the signature, and apply it as the very first statement in the function body (before allowed_special/disallowed_special logic) - I won't touch the return statement or the allowed_special/disallowed_special logic. Please keep your return_positions changes to the tail-end of the function (return statement) and avoid reordering the signature params I add. This should let both patches coexist with minimal collision. Also I will not touch encode_ordinary/encode_batch/encode_to_numpy/encode_with_unstable. OK with this split?
